testimonials.headline: What Players Say
testimonials.t1: Won 15,000 credits on my first day! The Classic Slots are addictive.
testimonials.t2: Love how easy it is to get started. The free credits were a nice surprise.
testimonials.t3: Megaways is insane — 117,649 ways to win. Best slot game I've played.
testimonials.t4: The mobile experience is perfect. I play on my commute every day.
testimonials.t5: Cascade Reels with chain multipliers is genius. Hit an 8x multiplier yesterday!
testimonials.t6: Simple, beautiful, and fair. The provably fair system gives me confidence.

freeToPlay.a: Yes! Every new player receives 500 free credits on signup with no deposit required. You also earn 50 free credits daily just by logging in.

welcomeBonus.q: How do I claim my welcome bonus?
welcomeBonus.a: Simply create an account and your 500 free credits will be added automatically. No promo code needed.

fairGames.a: Absolutely. We use a provably fair system based on HMAC-SHA256 cryptographic seeds. Every spin result can be independently verified. You can check any past spin using the server seed, client seed, and nonce.

jackpotWorks.a: A small percentage (0.5%) of every bet contributes to the progressive jackpot pool. The jackpot can be won on any spin — the current amount is displayed in real time.

mobilePlay.a: Yes! Midnight Riches is fully responsive and works on all modern mobile browsers. No app download required.

paymentMethods.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards through our secure Stripe payment integration. All transactions are encrypted and PCI-DSS compliant.

withdrawWinnings.q: How do I withdraw my winnings?
withdrawWinnings.a: Navigate to your Wallet page and select Withdraw. Withdrawals are processed within 24 hours to your original payment method.

dataSecure.a: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption for all data transmission. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt, and all payments are handled by Stripe with no card details stored on our servers.

finalCta.headline: Your Next Big Win is One Spin Away

exitIntent.headline: Wait! Your 500 Free Credits Are About to Expire
exitIntent.description: Claim your welcome bonus before it's gone. No deposit, no card required.
exitIntent.dismiss: No thanks, I'll pass on free credits
